ddls:
CREATE TABLE "stocks" (
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each stock */,
  "stock_symbol" TEXT /* Stock symbol (e.g., AAPL, MSFT) */,
  "company_name" TEXT /* Name of the company */,
  "exchange" TEXT /* Stock exchange (e.g., NASDAQ, NYSE) */,
  "sector" TEXT /* Sector of the company (e.g., Technology, Finance) */,
  "industry" TEXT /* Industry of the company (e.g., Software, Banking) */,
  "currency" TEXT /* Currency in which the stock is traded (e.g., USD, EUR) */,
  "isin" TEXT /* International Securities Identification Number (ISIN) */,
  "cusip" TEXT /* Committee on Uniform Securities Identification Procedures (CUSIP) number */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the company */,
  "website" TEXT /* Company website URL */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stock_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "stock_prices" (
  "price_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each price record */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the stock */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the price record */,
  "closing_price" REAL /* Closing price of the stock */,
  "opening_price" REAL /* Opening price of the stock */,
  "high_price" REAL /* Highest price of the stock on the given day */,
  "low_price" REAL /* Lowest price of the stock on the given day */,
  "volume" TEXT /* Trading volume of the stock on the given day */,
  "adj_closing_price" REAL /* Adjusted closing price for splits and dividends */,
  "dividend" REAL /* Dividend paid on the stock */,
  "split_coefficient" REAL /* Split coefficient (e.g., 2:1, 3:2) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("price_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_stock_prices_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., investor, analyst, admin) */,
  "registration_date" TEXT /* Date the user registered */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role FOREIGN KEY ("role") REFERENCES user_roles ("role_name")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role (e.g., investor, analyst, admin) */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Permissions associated with the role (e.g., read, write, admin) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "stock_watchlists" (
  "watchlist_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each watchlist entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who added the stock to the watchlist */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock being watched */,
  "added_date" TEXT /* Date the stock was added to the watchlist */,
  "notes" TEXT /* User notes about the stock */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("watchlist_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_stock_watchlists_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_stock_watchlists_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "stock_comparisons" (
  "comparison_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each comparison entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the comparison */,
  "stock_id_1" INTEGER /* ID of the first stock in the comparison */,
  "stock_id_2" INTEGER /* ID of the second stock in the comparison */,
  "comparison_date" TEXT /* Date the comparison was created */,
  "notes" TEXT /* User notes about the comparison */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("comparison_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_stock_comparisons_stock_id_1 FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id_1") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_stock_comparisons_stock_id_2 FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id_2") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_stock_comparisons_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "stock_reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the report */,
  "report_name" TEXT /* Name of the report */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of the report (e.g., performance, comparison) */,
  "creation_date" TEXT /* Date the report was created */,
  "last_modified" TEXT /* Date the report was last modified */,
  "report_data" TEXT /* Report data in JSON format */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_stock_reports_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "stock_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each metric record */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock */,
  "metric_name" TEXT /* Name of the metric (e.g., P/E ratio, EPS) */,
  "metric_value" REAL /* Value of the metric */,
  "metric_date" TEXT /* Date the metric was recorded */,
  "metric_type" TEXT /* Type of the metric (e.g., fundamental, technical) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_stock_metrics_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "stock_news" (
  "news_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each news article */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock */,
  "headline" TEXT /* Headline of the news article */,
  "article" TEXT /* Full text of the news article */,
  "publication_date" TEXT /* Date the news article was published */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the news article (e.g., Bloomberg, CNBC) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("news_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_stock_news_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "stock_events" (
  "event_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each event */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock */,
  "event_name" TEXT /* Name of the event (e.g., earnings, conference call) */,
  "event_date" TEXT /* Date of the event */,
  "event_type" TEXT /* Type of the event (e.g., earnings, conference call) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("event_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_stock_events_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_notifications" (
  "notification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each notification */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "notification_type" TEXT /* Type of the notification (e.g., stock price alert, new report) */,
  "notification_date" TEXT /* Date the notification was sent */,
  "notification_message" TEXT /* Text of the notification */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("notification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_notifications_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
